cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Constructs a malformed claim ledger, runs index --check, and asserts the CLI output preserves file path, line number, failed rule, and suggested fix.
Writes an invalid ActivationRecord and asserts records validate surfaces the record type, object ID, failed field, rule marker, path, and suggested fix.

changes_made: Added duplicate-claim suggested fix in src/mechledger/core/claim_ledger.py and tightened diagnostics assertions.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Creates a malformed claim heading and asserts the diagnostic includes the claim ledger path, line number, claim heading rule, and suggested fix.
Creates a duplicate C001 claim and now asserts path, exact duplicate line, object ID, duplicate rule, and suggested fix.
Creates duplicate D001 decision headings and asserts path, duplicate line number, object ID, duplicate rule, and suggested fix.
Writes a malformed research_log.md entry heading, calls parse_research_log, and asserts path, line number, rule, and suggested fix.
Creates an ExperimentSpec missing status and asserts path, YAML line, experiment ID, required-field rule, and suggested fix.
Writes a CSV run row with invalid status and asserts path, row line number, run ID, failed status rule, and suggested fix.
Runs prediction lock on an invalid prediction and asserts path, prediction ID, validation rule, failed field, and suggested fix.
Runs labels validate on malformed JSONL metadata and asserts path with line, label ID, validation rule, failed field, and suggested fix.
Validates a bad ActivationRecord through the records CLI and asserts path, record type, activation ID, failed enum field, rule marker, and fix.
Uses the labels validate command and checks JSONL line number, object ID, failed linked_claims field, validation rule, and suggested fix.
Exercises prediction lock failure and verifies the surfaced diagnostic keeps path, prediction ID, rule, failed field, and suggested fix.
Exercises prediction score failure states for unlocked predictions and missing run evidence rather than relying on filename-only behavior.
Validates a full ActivationRecord fixture through the CLI and records show output, including activation_id and prd_defined_typed schema status.
Removes activation_id, corrupts shape, and removes summary_stats.max_abs to assert required PRD fields and validators fail.
Validates both WeightAnalysisRun and WeightAnalysisRecord fixtures, proving the compatibility alias canonicalizes successfully.
Shows a WeightAnalysisRecord alias and asserts canonical_record_type WeightAnalysisRun plus the documented record_specific_id fallback.
Asserts WeightAnalysisRecord canonicalizes to WeightAnalysisRun and uses wrapper record_id as the documented specific ID fallback.

rows.remaining_gap: ActivationRecord, CircuitGraph, and CrossModelComparison have PRD-specific IDs; WeightAnalysisRun has no separate PRD-specific identifier, so record_id is used and documented.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Validates FeatureCorrespondenceRecord, TrainingDynamicsRecord, and RemoteJobMetadataRecord as extension records with shared metadata only.
Adds an unsupported computed_result field to an extension record and asserts validation rejects the extra field.
Exports RO-Crate twice, compares bytes, and asserts platform record @id, recordSpecificId, linked runs, linked decisions, artifact paths, and evidenceRole.
Exports all PRD typed records plus aliases and extension records, then asserts canonical types and extension schema status in RO-Crate.
Creates an ActivationRecord, exports manifest-only bundle, and asserts full platform record metadata appears without sweeping tensor bytes.
Generates dashboard data and asserts counts by record type, counts by schema status, and platform_records_are_evidence false.
Writes tensor bytes at a platform record path, exports with include-artifacts, and asserts the unregistered tensor path is not included in bundle files.
AST-scans every src/mechledger module and fails on heavy ML, network, RDF, graph, and framework imports.
Parses pyproject.toml dependencies and asserts heavy ML, network client, RDF, graph, and execution stacks are absent.
AST-scans class and function definitions and rejects PatchSpec, backend abstractions, model loading, intervention, and platform computation names.
Reads README and usage docs and asserts they state non-execution, metadata-only records, heavy dependencies outside core, RO-Crate noncanonical, dashboard server status, and remote merge boundary.
Positive metadata-only regression proves validation/export records metadata while leaving unregistered tensor bytes out of artifact payloads.
Stages a bad draft, edits the worktree draft to comply, and asserts draft check --staged passes using working-tree staged dependencies.
Stages research and project config paths and asserts index --check --staged runs validation and reports index check passed.
The staged draft test would fail under stash/blob-only isolation because the compliant worktree edit is not the staged draft blob.
Stages only notes.txt and asserts both draft and index staged commands exit zero with their documented skip messages.
Runs mechledger run around a Python command and asserts run.json, stdout capture, artifact manifest, debt report, attach, annotate, and run-ledger append behavior.
The wrapped command writes into MECHLEDGER_RUN_DIR/artifacts and the test asserts artifact_manifest.json contains auto-collected artifacts.
Places unregistered tensor bytes at a declared platform path and asserts bundle file entries do not include that path.
Scores predictions against runs where feature identity comes from event metadata, metric metadata, and run metadata, not prediction filenames.

changes_made: Added claim-ledger unchanged assertion to external label workflow test.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Imports, lists, shows, links, and exports a label while asserting the claim ledger text remains unchanged after linking.

changes_made: Added claim-ledger unchanged assertion to external label workflow test.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Links L001 to C001, verifies the label registry records the link, and asserts the claim ledger is byte-for-byte unchanged.
AST-scans for web framework imports and asserts the CLI has no dashboard serve or server command registered.

rows.remaining_gap: Remote sync merge is deferred/outside the local conflict-reporting commands.
General model execution and intervention frameworks are non-goals.
Citation verification and statistic recomputation belong to separate tools.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Rejects execution framework class/function names such as PatchSpec, ModelBackend, run_model, load_model, and compute_activations in src/mechledger.
AST import scan blocks TransformerLens, SAELens, NNsight, pyvene, PyTorch, and network-client abstraction dependencies in core modules.
Locks a prediction, mutates score/lock fields, and asserts the semantic canonical hash excludes mutable lock and score fields.
Changes semantic prediction content after lock and asserts lock detects modified_after_lock instead of silently relocking.
After modified-after-lock detection, reruns lock with --force and asserts the prediction can be intentionally relocked.
Scores a locked prediction against latest run and asserts scored_against_run_id, sign_match, relative_magnitude_match, tamper_status, and CLI output fields.
Exercises labels import, list, show, link, and RO-Crate export with a real JSONL label registry.
Creates unrelated files while resolving aliases and asserts normal alias/index behavior does not sweep arbitrary project artifacts.

changes_made: Added a specific regression test for user-supplied run ID collision failure.

cited_tests.why_this_test_actually_covers_the_requir: Creates an existing run directory, invokes mechledger run with the same user-supplied run ID, and asserts exit code 2 plus the collision message and run ID.
Creates failed and cancelled runs and asserts reclassification cannot promote them to evidence classes.
Runs RO-Crate export twice and compares ro-crate-metadata.json bytes to enforce deterministic output.
AST import scan rejects rdflib and related non-core graph/RDF imports under src/mechledger.
Shows a WeightAnalysisRecord alias and asserts linked_runs, linked_claims, and linked_decisions are normalized and exposed in records show output.
Shows a WeightAnalysisRecord alias and asserts artifact_paths include result, tensor, and config artifact fields in deterministic order.
Exports aliases and asserts ActivationRecord uses activation_id while WeightAnalysisRecord uses the documented stable record_id fallback.
Asserts records show includes canonical type, schema status, record-specific ID, linked runs, linked claims, linked decisions, and artifact paths.

Reads README and usage docs and asserts documentation states execution non-goals, metadata-only records, heavy-dependency boundary, RO-Crate noncanonical status, dashboard server status, and remote merge boundary.
Asserts every completion-ledger row ID appears in the Markdown completion ledger and cross-links to coverage rows.
